KVK açıklaması

Textile and Fashion Design Department of Dogus University, Faculty of Art and Design, started education and teaching in 2017-2018. Textile and Fashion Design Department students are required to be creative and capable designers with ethical values; while they are developing their talents and creative thoughts during their four years of education, they are also integrated with culture-art-technology concepts, supported with aesthetic and ethical values as well as contemporary knowledge and technical skills.

The Department of Textile and Fashion Design is composed of contemporary, well-educated academic staff with national and international experience. The department lecturers give great importance to improving the knowledge and skills of the students in a highly qualified way.

Department Head

Asst. Prof. Başak ÖZKENDİRCİ
